function.message: I reviewed the next inbox note and attempted to execute it exactly. The request explicitly lists five OCR source files, but only four are available/readable; one listed source file is missing. Because explicit file lists are the exact required scope, I did not substitute files or perform partial edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox processing workflow and explicit-file completeness rule; when one explicitly listed file was missing, stopped without workspace mutation.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the inbox instruction specifies an exact five-file list and one listed source file cannot be read/found, so full completion is impossible without guessing or substituting.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of 5th listed file (not found)
